question:
03. Why do vendors provide MD5 values for their software patches?
a) To provide the necessary key for patch activation
b) To allow the downloader to verify the authenticity of the site providing the patch
c) To ensure that auto-updates are enabled for subsequent patch releases
d) To allow the recipient to verify the integrity of the patch prior to installation
canonical_answer: d) To allow the recipient to verify the integrity of the patch prior to installation

appears_in.title: B.4 Comptia Security+ Sy0 601 Certification Practice Exam
appears_in.answer: d) To allow the recipient to verify the integrity of the patch prior to installation

appears_in.title: Comptia Security+ Exam Answers
appears_in.answer: d) To allow the recipient to verify the integrity of the patch prior to installation

appears_in.title: Comptia Security+ Sy0 601 Exam Questions
appears_in.answer: d) To allow the recipient to verify the integrity of the patch prior to installation

appears_in.title: Comptia Sy0 601 Exam Actual Questions
appears_in.answer: d) To allow the recipient to verify the integrity of the patch prior to installation

appears_in.title: Security Plus Answers
appears_in.answer: d) To allow the recipient to verify the integrity of the patch prior to installation

appears_in.title: Security Plus Test Answers
appears_in.answer: d) To allow the recipient to verify the integrity of the patch prior to installation
